label: Personal Auto
description: Private passenger vehicle coverage including liability, comprehensive, collision, and UM/UIM. State-specific rating and no-fault variations.

label: Commercial Auto
description: Business vehicle fleets covering trucks, vans, and specialist vehicles. Includes DOT/FMCSA compliance, CDL driver validation, and GVW-based rating.

label: HO-3 Homeowners
description: Open-peril dwelling and named-peril personal property cover. State-specific endorsements for FL, TX, CA windstorm, flood zones, and wildfire risk scoring.

label: Commercial Package
description: Multi-line package bundling property, GL, crime, and inland marine into a single policy with cross-line package discounts and shared aggregate limits.

label: Workers Compensation
description: Statutory employer liability for workplace injuries. NCCI class codes, experience modification factors, and state benefit schedule compliance across all US jurisdictions.

label: Commercial Property
description: Buildings, contents, stock, and plant against physical loss. UK-focused with EA flood map integration, BREEAM sustainability discounts, and reinstatement value basis.

label: Business Interruption
description: Gross profit and increased costs of working following an insured property event. Indemnity period, turnover basis, and seasonal adjustment calculations.

label: Contamination / Environmental
description: Pollution clean-up costs and third-party liability under UK Environment Act and EU ELD. Phase I/II ESA triggers, EA permit validation, and SSSI/SAC proximity checks.

label: Terrorism & Political Violence
description: Property damage and BI from acts of terrorism, sabotage, and political violence. Aligned to UK Pool Re reinsurance scheme with CBRN extension and accumulation zone monitoring.

label: Contractors All Risks (CAR)
description: Construction project all-risks covering contract works, TPL, existing structures, and DSU. JCT/NEC contract form aligned with subcontractor scheduling and BIM level discounts.

label: Erection All Risks (EAR)
description: Mechanical and electrical plant during installation and testing. Covers cold and hot commissioning phases, performance guarantee tests, and DSU indemnity period.

label: Engineering / Machinery Breakdown
description: Sudden and unforeseen physical damage to machinery and plant in operation. Includes boiler and pressure vessel inspection services under PSSR 2000 statutory obligations.

label: Infrastructure / PFI Projects
description: Long-duration PFI/PPP project insurance covering property damage, public liability, and lenders' interests. Concession period adjustments and step-in rights trigger management.

label: Marine Hull
description: Physical loss or damage to ocean-going vessels on ITC Hulls 1/11/95 or IHC 2003. Class society status validation, trading area restrictions, and JWC war risk area monitoring.

label: Marine Cargo
description: Goods in transit by sea, air, road, and rail on ICC (A/B/C) clauses. Open cover and declaration-based structures with IMDG hazardous goods validation.

label: Marine Liability
description: P&I, charterers, and port operators liability. Port State Control detention history, ISM/ISPS/MLC certificate tracking, and crew pollution trigger rules.

label: Aviation Hull
description: Physical damage to aircraft on AVN 1C agreed value basis. Certificate of Airworthiness expiry tracking, fleet scheduling, and lessors' interest endorsements.

label: Aviation Liability
description: TPL, passenger, and cargo liability under EC Regulation 785/2004 and Montreal Convention. SDR-based minimum limit calculation with AOC registry validation.

label: Directors & Officers (D&O)
description: Side A/B/C protection for corporate directors and officers. FCA register integration, listed company securities trigger, and cross-border subsidiary jurisdiction loading.

label: Professional Indemnity (PI)
description: Claims-made cover for solicitors, accountants, architects, and consultants. SRA/ICAS/ARB mandatory minimum limits, regulatory body lookup, and run-off premium calculation.

label: Cyber & Data Breach
description: First-party costs, ransomware, data privacy liability, and regulatory fines. MFA mandatory controls, GDPR/UK GDPR scoring, and cloud concentration accumulation monitoring.

label: Financial Institutions
description: Combined BBB, E&O, D&O, and cyber for banks and asset managers. FCA/PRA registry validation, Basel classification loading, and SMCR/SMF holder count checks.

label: Crime / Fidelity Guarantee
description: Employee theft, forgery, computer fraud, social engineering, and funds transfer fraud. Client funds custody requirements and dual control procedure validation.

label: Employment Practices Liability
description: Wrongful termination, discrimination, and harassment claims. ACAS conciliation integration, protected characteristic exposure scoring, and third-party harassment extension.

label: Kidnap & Ransom (K&R)
description: Ransom payments, crisis consultancy, wrongful detention, and extortion. Confidential policy handling, FCDO high-risk country list integration, and crisis consultant panel management.

label: Fine Art & Specie
description: Agreed value cover for artworks, antiques, and specie for collectors, galleries, and dealers. Provenance verification thresholds, art market index adequacy checks, and transit extensions.

label: Jewellers Block
description: All-risks stock, transit, display, and customers' property for jewellery trade. NSI Gold alarm standard validation, safe and vault grade-based limit gating, and approved transit carriers.

label: Life Sciences / Clinical Trials
description: Clinical trial indemnity, product liability, and recall for pharma and biotech. MHRA/EudraCT registry validation, Phase I-IV risk scoring, and ATMP/gene therapy special conditions.

label: Medical Malpractice
description: Clinical negligence for NHS trusts, GPs, and consultants. CQC registration, NHS Resolution CNST/LTPS scheme alignment, and specialty risk grading with long-tail run-off.

label: Energy Onshore / Offshore
description: Physical damage, control of well, and operator's extra expense for oil, gas, and renewables. PML-based capacity management, UKCS licence validation, and HSE offshore consent tracking.
